regimeNotes: NEUTRAL regime maintained 2026-06-26. DXY ~101.40 (13-month high; prior close 101.43, essentially unchanged). 10Y Treasury yield 4.45% (Jun 25 close). Fed median 2026 year-end dot shifted to 3.8% (from 3.4% in March); October rate hike now priced in by markets. Iran conflict sustaining energy-driven inflation at multi-year highs, delaying any easing path. Crypto: BTC $58,773 (-3.92% 24h) — below prior $61,595; ETH $1,527.67 (-6.40% 24h); SOL $68.65 (+0.67%). Fear and Greed 13 (Extreme Fear, persistent). Total crypto mcap $2.13T (-0 net from prior); BTC dominance 55.69%. Equities: SPY $734.30 (~flat, near ATH); PCE in-line with expectations; tech names (MSFT, NVDA) under pressure but broad index resilient. GLD $369.46 (stable above $350 invalidation). Crypto sleeve 18.93% of NAV (within 20% neutral cap). Cash 14.20% of NAV (well above 5% floor). NAV $95,114.77. No invalidation levels breached. Zero trades today: Fed hawkish pivot toward October hike, DXY at 13-month high, crypto in Extreme Fear and declining, tech names under selling pressure — hold dry powder; all existing theses intact; await regime clarity before adding risk.

SPY.thesis: Core US equity beta at $734.30 (near ATH; above $741.75 avgCost by small margin). Broad S&P index showing resilience despite tech selloff and hawkish Fed pivot; sector rotation into industrials and healthcare supporting index. HOLD.
SPY.invalidationLevel: Sustained close below 660 USD or confirmed multi-hike path forcing a technical downtrend in the broad index.

NVDA.thesis: AI/compute secular leader at $195.74 (below $208.44 avgCost, 14.32% NAV). Tech selloff is broad profit-taking; AI capex cycle and data-center demand intact — Micron's strong AI memory earnings a positive read-through for NVDA. Hold through volatility.
NVDA.invalidationLevel: AI capex digestion or data-center demand rollover; close below 150 USD.

MSFT.thesis: Quality AI/cloud compounder at $352.83 (below $391.98 avgCost, 14.13% NAV). Azure + Copilot revenue growing; Iran-war inflation and rate hike risk are temporary headwinds. Thesis intact — holding through weakness.
MSFT.invalidationLevel: Cloud growth deceleration or AI capex without demonstrable ROI; close below 340 USD.

GOOGL.thesis: Quality growth (search + cloud + AI) at $343.71 (below $366.53 avgCost, 14.20% NAV). Search monopoly and cloud revenue dominant. Tech selloff is sector-wide noise; thesis intact. HOLD.
GOOGL.invalidationLevel: Search share erosion to AI rivals causing revenue decline; close below 310 USD.

UNH.thesis: Defensive value at $415.53 (above $408.52 avgCost — in profit, 6.42% NAV). Healthcare defensives outperforming as investors rotate from tech; serves as ballast against growth-stock volatility.
UNH.invalidationLevel: Further regulatory or medical-cost shock; close below 360 USD.

GLD.thesis: Tail/debasement hedge at $369.46 (below $386.54 avgCost, 4.29% NAV). DXY at 13-month high is a headwind; Iran conflict geopolitical risk provides partial support. Small position limits NAV drag; monitoring proximity to $350 invalidation.
GLD.invalidationLevel: Real yields spike with strong USD reversal sustained; close below 350 USD.

BTC.thesis: Core crypto sleeve leader at $58,773 (below $64,629 avgCost, 13.86% NAV). BTC dropped -4% today on persistent hawkish Fed signals and DXY strength. F&G 13 (Extreme Fear) is deeply contrarian bullish historically; BTC dominance 55.69% stable. Well-positioned for next risk-on expansion. Monitor $52K weekly close carefully.

ETH.thesis: Discounted L1 leader at $1,527.67 (below $1,667.47 avgCost, 3.85% NAV). ETH dominance 8.71%; -6.4% today reflects broad risk-off in crypto. Asymmetric upside when risk-on returns. Small position appropriate given macro headwinds.
ETH.invalidationLevel: Structural loss of share to L1 rivals; close below 1,300 USD.

SOL.thesis: High-beta satellite at $68.65 (above $67.81 avgCost, 1.22% NAV). Small position to ride volatility; first to scale up when regime flips to risk-on and crypto sleeve cap expands to 35%.
SOL.invalidationLevel: Break below 52 USD; network deterioration or sentiment collapse.
